title: More Beautiful Ladders
description: This mod adds around 300 new Ladders and pulls textures from the block of minecraft vanilla.
body:
This mod adds around 300 new Ladders. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) **CRAFTING** > > - To create these new Ladders you must first create the Ladder Frame. Below examples of the recipe. > - You can use the ladder from the vanilla game for the recipe. > - You can now use the Ladder Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. > - Some Ladders emit light like their respective blocks.

Some Ladders

![Some Ladders from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeea6da5f1f19f40747a2441c8687a4c44ace252.png)

Ladder Frame recipe

![Ladder Frame Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/816e2a6b1478be61c312684efa319684690e657a.png)

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 3 ladders)

Magma Block Ladder

![Magma Block Ladder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd3f581b1fac29582a061a12a043f4647dbc7004.png)

Obsidian Cry Ladder

![Obsidian Cry Ladder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d688c3f3a955a8e4ca34e2f67d4f0551b0c2c19e.png)

Diamond Block Ladder

![Diamond Block Ladder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08b697a86b6690c4edd23179dfdebe2b92ea887.png)

Black Stained Glass Ladder (All types of glass are present)

![Black Stained Glass Ladder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d9c070a23a58a5d496d64725708692e68e1a6de.png)

Special Ladders

For some Ladders you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Ladder, Fire Soul Ladder, Lava Ladder(2 version), Nether Portal Ladder and Strange Ladder(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
